Support FAQs
Support, Contact & Membership Queries
Support FAQs
How do I change the credit card linked
to my account?
Email support@cathowell.com
How do I join the support calls?
You'll find the link to join each call posted to the Facebook group 2 hours before the
call. All links for the calls can also be found under the file "FATC Weekly Support Calls"
which is located inside the FILES section of the FATC Facebook group.
Where are the replays to the calls?
In the Files section of the Facebook group.
When are the calls in my timezone?
All calls are stated in US Eastern Time (New York). You can use a website like World
Time Buddy to work out when the calls are for you.
I'm going on vacation, can I put my
membership on pause?
We don't allow pauses during FATC memberships, but you can cancel your
membership so you can sign up again when you're back by
emailing support@cathowell.com
How do I cancel my membership?
Email support@cathowell.com

Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
Contact Support
